notes: F008 is the sprint's user-facing culmination. Five-step wizard at /onboarding. Consumes F006 (auth + credentials) and F007 (broker step link). Cold-install cycle test via /settings/reset-install is part of the acceptance criteria.
review_criteria: Confirm the five-step flow reads correctly for a first-time user
Confirm the passphrase step handles both keychain-present and keychain-absent cases without confusing the user
Identify what F008 does NOT try to solve (multi-user provisioning, native mobile onboarding, subscription/payment) -- feed to future sprints
